name: graph_streaming_encode_multigroup_labeled
description: Streaming graph encode over three distance groups with the opt-in labeled trailer counts form (SPEC 8.4.1). Identical input to 006; labeled trailer counts=targets:3,related:2,extended:1,edges:4 confirm the label-to-value mapping and group order (targets, related, extended, edges). Runners skip a graph-stream-encode fixture whose options they do not support.
